other_observers: Tony Leukering, Brandon Percival. Many others saw the bird later in the day.; I found it with Brandon and Tony.
description: See photos and similar species.Behaviors: Brandon, Tony and I got out of the car and I immediately saw this bird perched in a conifer. Before lifting my binocular, I said "Purple Finch". Tony and Brandon came over and we were able to see and photograph the bird at leisure. It remained in the same tree the entire time we saw it, just changing perches until if flew off. It never vocalized, even when it flew off.Call: NonePlumage: female-plumaged
